commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3552dc71d4d86459e9208681c93f767420dab65c)
commands.review_summary:
Adds `CODEXBAR_DEV_TRUST_KEYCHAIN=1` handling to bypass Claude OAuth Keychain reads and adds targeted credential-store tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding by source inspection: the PR reads `CODEXBAR_DEV_TRUST_KEYCHAIN` from process environment outside `#if DEBUG` and then disables Claude Keychain access when it is set. I did not run live Keychain validation because the repository policy avoids prompt-prone checks unless explicitly requested.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor runtime proof and a maintainer decision on whether release builds may honor this auth-provider env switch; automation cannot supply the contributor’s real Keychain/dev-run proof.

target.title: Add dev-only Claude keychain prompt bypass
target.body:
Summary:

- Add an opt-in `CODEXBAR_DEV_TRUST_KEYCHAIN=1` development path for Claude OAuth credential loading.

- When enabled, local development runs can bypass interactive Claude OAuth Keychain reads and prefer the non-interactive file-based credential fallback.

- Log when the dev-trust path bypasses an interactive Keychain read so the behavior is visible during debugging.

- Add targeted tests for the dev-only bypass behavior.

Scope:

- This is intentionally limited to the Claude OAuth credential path.

- It does not attempt to fix browser-cookie provider prompts or SweetCookieKit Keychain prompts.

- It is intended as a local development escape hatch, not a default user-facing behavior change.

Validation:

- `swift build`

- `swift test --filter ClaudeOAuthCredentialsStoreTests`

- `swift test --filter 'ClaudeOAuthCredentialsStoreSecurityCLITests|KeychainAccessGate'`
target.author: yuxin-qiao

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
